creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Tue, Jul 31, 2001 at 11:46:30AM +0200, Rolf Larsson wrote:
> kris@FreeBSD.org said something like this:
> > 
> > Synopsis: 3.0-981009-BETA can't make swap device on wfd0 (wf stripped)
> > 
> > State-Changed-From-To: feedback->closed
> > State-Changed-By: kris
> > State-Changed-When: Sun Jul 15 13:17:59 PDT 2001
> > State-Changed-Why: 
> > Feedback timeout
> > 
> > http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=8303
> > 
> 
> Hi, for some reason I did not receive the feedback message. I checked
> my procmail logs and no sign of it. Strange...
> 
> Unfortunately, I do not have a zip/jaz drive, but I will examine
> it again when I do get one. Until then, let it remain closed and
> I'll ask to reopen it if need be.

Okay, cool.

Kris
